name: cc-plugins-vnz
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by vnz

plugins.name: date-context
plugins.description: Injects current date/time context at session start to fix web search year issues

plugins.name: terraform-ls
plugins.description: Terraform language server (terraform-ls) for code intelligence, go-to-definition, find-references, and hover docs

plugins.name: dependabot
plugins.description: Check for dependency updates using Dependabot CLI with auto-detection of package managers

plugins.name: bash-ls
plugins.description: Bash language server for code intelligence, diagnostics, and formatting in shell scripts

plugins.name: yaml-ls
plugins.description: YAML language server (yaml-language-server) for code intelligence, go-to-definition, find-references, and hover docs

plugins.name: lua-ls
plugins.description: Lua language server (lua-language-server) for code intelligence, go-to-definition, find-references, and hover docs

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Automated code review using Codex CLI with autonomous fix-review cycles
